analytics.toggleDescription: We use anonymous data to find where people get stuck, so we can make the next update better. No personally identifying information is collected.
analytics.marketingDescription: We anonymously measure how people who arrive via ads move through the app, to improve how we reach them. Turning this off has no effect on other features.

guestHero.heading: Sign in for the full experience
guestHero.body: Use your favorites and notifications on any device

consent.title: Our privacy commitment
consent.intro: Liverty Music keeps your personal data inside Japan by default. Anything you turn on below is opt-in — and you can change your mind any time in Settings.
consent.commitment: This is a commitment that goes beyond what the law requires. We only ask for anonymous, aggregated usage signals because they help us build a better timetable for you — never for advertising or sale.

analytics.label: Share anonymous usage insights
analytics.description: Tells us which screens fans love and which ones get in the way. No names, no contacts — just patterns.

marketing.label: Help measure ad effectiveness
marketing.description: We anonymously measure how people who arrive via ads move through the app, to improve how we reach them. Turning this off has no effect on other features.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (the "Terms") govern your use of the application "Liverty Music" (the "Service") provided by pannpers.dev ("we" or "us"). By using the Service, you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Scope
body: These Terms set out the conditions under which the Service is provided and the rights and obligations between us and users, and apply to every relationship between you and us concerning your use of the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of the Service
body: The Service is an application for music fans that lets you follow your favorite artists and receive their concert information and ticket on-sale timing as a curated list and as notifications.
The concert, ticket, and on-sale-timing information shown in the Service includes data aggregated and inferred from publicly available third-party sources.

sections.heading: 3. Accounts
body: To use certain features of the Service, you must register an account.
You are responsible for managing your own account credentials, and must not allow any third party to use them, nor lend or transfer them.

sections.heading: 4. Prohibited Conduct
body: In using the Service, you must not engage in any act that violates laws or public order and morals, infringes the rights of us or any third party, interferes with the operation of the Service, constitutes or attempts unauthorized access, or that we otherwise deem inappropriate.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer Regarding Third-Party Information
body: The concert, ticket, and on-sale-timing information provided by the Service originates from third-party sources, and we make no warranty whatsoever as to its accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or usefulness.
For ticket purchases, admission eligibility, on-sale start times, and the like, always confirm the official primary source. We are not liable for any damage you incur in reliance on such information.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability
body: We make no warranty, express or implied, that the Service is free from defects in fact or in law.

Except in cases of our willful misconduct or gross negligence, we are not liable for any damage arising in connection with the Service. However, where the relationship between us and a user under these Terms constitutes a consumer contract as defined in the Consumer Contract Act, our liability for damages caused by our ordinary negligence shall, in light of the fact that the Service is provided free of charge, be limited to the direct and ordinary damages actually incurred by the user.

sections.heading: 7. Suspension and Termination of Accounts
body: If you breach these Terms, or where we determine that there is a reasonable and unavoidable operational ground, we may suspend or delete your account without prior notice.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to These Terms
body: We may change these Terms pursuant to Article 548-4 of the Civil Code. When we change these Terms, we will notify users in advance of the content of the revised Terms and their effective date, by posting within the Service or by other appropriate means.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
body: The interpretation and application of these Terms are governed by the laws of Japan.

In the event of a dispute between us and a user concerning the Service, the Fukuoka District Court or the Fukuoka Summary Court shall be the court of exclusive agreed jurisdiction for the first instance.

sections.heading: Contact
body: For inquiries regarding these Terms, please contact pannpers@pannpers.dev.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: pannpers.dev ("we" or "us") establishes this Privacy Policy (the "Policy") regarding the handling of users' personal information in the application "Liverty Music" (the "Service"), as set out below. We comply with Japan's Act on the Protection of Personal Information (the "APPI") and other applicable laws.

sections.heading: 1. Operator Information
body: Personal information handling business operator: pannpers.dev
Contact: pannpers@pannpers.dev
The operator's name (as an individual) and address will be disclosed without delay upon request.

sections.heading: 2. Personal Information We Collect
body: In providing the Service, we collect the following personal information:
- Account information: email address and account identifier (user ID)
- Wallet address (safe_address): an address derived from the user ID, used to identify the account
- Home area (a setting for your region of residence)
- Artists you follow
- Language preference
- Push notification subscription information and device token
- Usage analytics data (interaction events; we use cookies and localStorage)

sections.heading: 3. Purposes of Use
body: We use the personal information we collect for the following purposes:
- Providing the Service and authenticating users
- Improving the Service through usage analysis
- Measuring advertising effectiveness
- Delivering push notifications
- Identifying the account and providing related features (including the generation and management of the wallet address)

sections.heading: 4. Provision to Third Parties and Outsourcing
body: In providing the Service, we entrust the handling of personal information to, or integrate with, the following external services:
- PostHog (product analytics)
- Resend (email delivery)
- Google (push notification delivery via Firebase Cloud Messaging / Web Push)
- Google (concert information search via Gemini / Vertex AI)
- Last.fm (retrieval of artist information; because the browser communicates with it directly, your IP address is transmitted)
Our authentication platform (Zitadel) is operated on servers we manage ourselves and does not constitute provision to a third party.

sections.heading: 5. External Transmission (Use of Cookies, etc.)
body: To provide the Service's features and to analyze usage, the Service transmits information directly from your device to the following external services:
- Recipient: Last.fm / Information transmitted: IP address, etc. / Purpose: retrieval of artist information
- Recipient: PostHog / Information transmitted: usage data recorded in cookies, localStorage, etc. / Purpose: improving the Service and measuring advertising effectiveness

sections.heading: 6. Cross-Border Transfer of Personal Data
body: The Service transfers usage analytics data to PostHog Cloud EU (within the European Union). This constitutes the provision of personal data to a third party in a foreign country under Article 28 of the APPI.
In addition, some of the external services above handle personal information on servers located in the United States or the United Kingdom.

We ensure the appropriate handling of personal data by confirming, through contracts and other means, that these transfer recipients have established systems conforming to the standards required by Japan's APPI.

sections.heading: 7. Withdrawing Consent
body: Cooperation with usage analysis and advertising-effectiveness measurement is optional. You may withdraw your consent at any time by turning off the "Help improve the experience" and "Help measure advertising effectiveness" toggles in the Settings screen.

sections.heading: 8. Disclosure Requests and Inquiries
body: You may request that we disclose, correct, add to, delete, or suspend the use of your personal information.
We will respond to these requests without delay in accordance with applicable laws, after verifying your identity. For these requests and any inquiries, please contact pannpers@pannpers.dev.

sections.heading: 9. Security Management Measures
body: We take necessary and appropriate measures to manage the security of the personal information we collect, including preventing its leakage, loss, or damage.

sections.heading: 10. Revisions to This Policy
body: We may revise this Policy as necessary. When there is a change in how we handle personal information — for example, when we begin integrating with a new external service — we will review this Policy.
The revised Policy takes effect when displayed within the Service.
